name.full: Engineering Design PPT Agent via APIM

description.short: Foundry agent package for engineering design presentations.
description.full: Teams package for the Engineering Design PPT agent routed through Azure API Management.

commands.title: Ask
commands.description: Ask a question about engineering design presentations

commands.title: Design scope
commands.prompt: In engineering_design_review_001.pptx, summarize the problem statement, project goal, and design scope described in the opening slides.

commands.title: Architecture layers
commands.prompt: What system components, layers, or services are shown in solution_architecture_update_002.pptx?

commands.title: Interfaces
commands.prompt: Which interfaces, data flows, or external integrations are called out between components in the architecture update deck?

commands.title: Risks
commands.prompt: What risks, open issues, or unresolved questions are highlighted in engineering_design_review_001.pptx?

commands.title: Compare decks
commands.prompt: Compare engineering_design_review_001.pptx with solution_architecture_update_002.pptx: what stayed the same, and what changed in the proposed architecture?

disclaimer.text: Answers are grounded in the configured engineering presentation documents and may reflect deployment-time search data.

commands.title: Ask Eng Design PPT
commands.description: Ask a question about engineering design presentations

samplePrompts.text: Summarize the problem statement and design scope in engineering_design_review_001.pptx.
What system components or layers are shown in solution_architecture_update_002.pptx?
What interfaces or data flows are called out between components in the architecture update deck?
What risks or open issues are highlighted in engineering_design_review_001.pptx?
Compare the two engineering decks: what stayed the same and what changed?

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.title: Question
parameters.description: Your question about engineering design presentations
